mapper.insert: INSERT INTO server_event (server_id, event_type, device_code, content, raw_data) VALUES (#{serverId}, #{eventType}, #{deviceCode}, #{content}, #{rawData})
mapper.select: SELECT DATE(create_time) as date, event_type as eventType, COUNT(*) as count FROM server_event WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE(create_time), event_type ORDER BY date ASC
SELECT event_type as eventType, COUNT(*) as count FROM server_event WHERE create_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY event_type ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT device_code as deviceCode, COUNT(*) as count FROM server_event WHERE device_code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY device_code ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
